title: Male
overview: Male is a simple story between two youngsters Varun and Varsha. After trying hard, Varun, a wealthy young man, succeeds in making Varsha accept his love. However, Varsha has a change of heart when she realizes that she cannot match his economic status. The movie name literally means rain in the Kannada language.
